The figure shows the single line diagram of a single machine infinite bus system.

A three-phase short circuit fault occurs at a certain location on one of the circuits of the double circuit transmission line. During fault, electrical power in pu is \( P_{\text{max}} \sin \delta \). If the values of \( \delta \) and \( \frac{d\delta}{dt} \) at the instant of fault clearing are \( 45^\circ \) and 3.762 radian/s respectively, then \( P_{\text{max}} \) (in pu) is ______.

rationale: Question is already open-ended.
